hooks.command:
INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '/problems/.*\.html$' || exit 0; REL="${FILE#/home/user/StudyList/}"; URL="https://kazumahattori1131-del.github.io/StudyList/${REL}"; grep -qF "$URL" "$FILE" || sed -i "s|<body>|<body>
<!--

${URL}

-->|" "$FILE"; printf '{"systemMessage":"GitHub Pages URL:
%s"}' "$URL"
